S.FORM: Woody Allen kawas tay 1935, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 11, Woody Allen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: woo*j allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, woo*j allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: woo*j allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, woo*j allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
